commanded_lines: Action envelope: read-only validation; write only workers/validator-dkr-p3/verification.v1.json and progress.finish.json; no product, git, frame, tree, ledger, release, or external-state changes.
Validation decision: the frozen hashes, one result per control, raw arithmetic, and deterministic exit-1 rejection are accepted as reducing discovery only.
Downstream decision: the method remains rejected; CKR performance, measurement implementation, and optimization remain blocked.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
